questions.question: Name the famous acting duo, considered one of the greatest on-screen pairings, who thrilled audiences in Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid and The Sting.
What 1952 Ralph Ellison novel exposed the social and intellectual issues facing African-Americans?
What country music star and television personality released 100 albums in his career that included chart-topping songs "Tennessee Stud" and "Make the World Go Away"?
What Baltimore Colts quarterback was named the NFL's Most Valuable Player in 1959, 1964, and 1967?
What host regularly began his episode with, "We have a really big show tonight," but pronounced "show" like "shew"?
